mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS supplement_id, s.session_id AS session_id, s.student_id AS student_id, s.reason AS reason, s.status AS status, s.approve_note AS approve_note, s.create_time AS create_time,
u.name AS student_name, u.account_number AS student_account_number, u.avatar AS student_avatar,
ses.title AS session_title, ses.start_time AS session_start_time, ses.course_id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name FROM checkin_supplement s INNER JOIN checkin_session ses ON s.session_id = ses.id LEFT JOIN course c ON ses.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.student_id = u.id WHERE ses.creator_id = #{teacherId}
AND s.status = 0
ORDER BY s.status ASC, s.create_time DESC LIMIT 200
